workflow.description: The Journal Entry approval process has been defined to support the Approval Matrix shared for each group.
workflow.name: Journal Entry Approval

initcondition.formula: "Approval Status" IN ("Approval Status1") AND isEmpty("Reversal Date") = 'F' AND isEmpty("Reversal #") = 'F'
"Approval Status" IN ("Approval Status1") AND isEmpty("Reversal Date") = 'F'
"Journal Approval Matrix" IN ("Journal Approval Matrix1","Journal Approval Matrix2","Journal Approval Matrix3","Journal Approval Matrix4","Journal Approval Matrix5")
"Journal Approval Matrix" IN ("Journal Approval Matrix1","Journal Approval Matrix2","Journal Approval Matrix3")
"Journal Entry Total Amount" <= 1000000 AND "Journal Approval Matrix" IN ("Journal Approval Matrix1") AND "Type" IN ("Transaction Type1")
"Journal Entry Total Amount" > 1000000 AND "Journal Approval Matrix" IN ("Journal Approval Matrix1")

sendemailaction.body: Your Journal Entry {TRANID} has been approved for {SUBSIDIARY}
sendemailaction.subject: JE {TRANID} approved

sendemailaction.body: Your Journal Entry {TRANID} has been rejected.
sendemailaction.subject: JE {TRANID} rejected

initcondition.formula: "Journal Approval Matrix" IN ("Journal Approval Matrix1","Journal Approval Matrix2","Journal Approval Matrix3")

sendemailaction.body:
A Journal ({tranid}) has been deleted manually by {user.email} using custom function during initiation state.

Data: {

Record Type: {type},

Record ID: {id},

Record Subsidiary: {subsidiary},

Record Memo: {memo},

Record Posting Period: {postingperiod},

Deleted By: {

id: {user.id}

name: {user.entityid}

email: {user.email}

}
sendemailaction.subject: [DELETE][{subsidiary}][{id}][{type}][{user.entityid}]
